title: Monarchs
description: Immersive factions mod. Become a Monarch, rule over your knights, and wage war on other monarchs. Choose the optimal buffs,  destroy enemy factions, but don't lose your own.
body:
Overview

Monarchs provides an immersive factions system, relying on crowns,
swords and unique items to interact with your faction.

Tutorial

  • Equip the Rose Gold Circlet
  • Right click on players with a sword (consumes paper)
  • Manage your faction’s strengths by choosing a monarch type that suits your strategy

Monarch Types

  • Monarch of Iron:High defense in return for low mobility
  • Monarch of Flame: High mobility in return for low defense
  • Monarch of Fury: High damage in return for low health

 Hierarchy System
When a Monarch dies, they drop their crown. If a faction member picks up the crown, they can choose to either become the new Monarch by donning the crown, or give the crown back to the original monarch. If a non-faction member picks up the crown, they disband the faction, and everyone needs to reconvene.

Advancements
There are many advancements for becoming a Monarch, killing enemies, and killing other Monarchs.
